libretro_database.path: libretro_database\cht\Nintendo - Nintendo Entertainment System\Super Mario Bros. + Duck Hunt (USA).cht

sample_raw_entries.desc: Infinite Ammo
Timer counts up instead of down!!
Mario can jump higher when walking, running, or turbo running!  Also, he jumps further only when normal running.
The pipes you can't go down are upside-down, the pipes you can go down are normal.
"Level Select" code!!
"Level Select" code!!
Mario can swim everywhere, and you start some worlds about 1/2 way thru
Time starts at 900 instead of 400
Start with 400 more seconds, and invincibility for the first 10 seconds.
Opens route to minus world! at end of 1-2
Everything is invisible except mario & enemies
Mario starts out swimming
You can position Mario anywhere on the screen even when he's moving by holding down the "A" button on controller #2.
You can jump over the castle at the end of world 1-1 and keep on going. Also, going down tubes does weird things.
Items that were worth 1,000 points, are now worth 1,000,000,000 points!!
Time starts at 150 instead of 400 plus about 30 seconds of invincibility at the start of every life
Time starts with one extra minute 460 instead of 400
Time starts at 600 instead of 400 plus about 10 seconds of invincibility at the start of every life
Time starts at 995 instead of 400 plus about 20 seconds of invincibility at the start of every life
Play as Game Boy mario (everything is black & white)
Everything is offset by about 2 inches
Mario turns into the invisible man
Play at night
Swim without water (you're always swimming)
Slow-motion, plus other neat stuff

notes: Only cheat-address style raw entries available.
